TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Bill_Allen_(actor), title = Bill_Allen_(actor), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bill_Allen_(actor)} }

S.FORM: Bill Allen kawas tay 1962, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 11, Bill Allen, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Bill Allen kawas tay 1962, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 11, Bill Allen, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: βill allen kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, βill allen, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
